Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action
Off Calendar Aug-18-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SETH W. WIENER, Esq. of Law Offices of Seth W. Wiener (Tel: 925-487-5607) for plaintiff Charles F. Campos;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CHARLES CAMPOS' Motion To Stay Action.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. No proof of service filed. (Cal. R. Ct. 3.1300(c).)

The Court suggests to plaintiff's counsel that he attempt to meet and confer with defense counsel to see if a stipulation can be reached on this issue. If a stipulation can be reached, the parties may present their stipulation by way of an ex parte application at Dept. 302's daily 11:00 a.m. ex parte hearings. If not, plaintiff may attempt to re-file this motion and provide notice to defendants.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
